description:
A local OpenAI-compatible proxy for Gemini CLI and Kiro in a native Flutter app

KiCk starts a local OpenAI-compatible endpoint on your device and forwards
requests to Gemini CLI through connected Google accounts, or to Kiro through
an AWS Builder ID session. It is built for people who want to use Gemini CLI
or Kiro without the terminal, manual sign-in setup, or a separate local server.
